benefitDescription: Get the placement first, then read it in plain English. The page is designed for quick answers, credible interpretation, and a natural handoff into astrocartography.
usageDescription: Use the calculator first, then turn the result into a practical chart or location question.

usageItems.title: Enter birth data
usageItems.description: Add your birth date, time, birthplace, and timezone. Exact time improves house placement and degree accuracy.

usageItems.title: Calculate the placement
usageItems.description: Click {submit} to get the placement this page focuses on, with sign, degree, and house when available.

usageItems.title: Continue to the map
usageItems.description: Open astrocartography with the same birth data and explore where this chart theme may feel stronger.

featureDescription: Built for clarity: a focused calculator, concise interpretation, related astrology context, and a direct path into location-based exploration.

featureItems.title: Tool-first layout
featureItems.description: The calculator appears before the long educational content, matching high-intent users who want an answer quickly.

featureItems.title: Plain-English interpretation
featureItems.description: Professional astrology terms are explained in accessible language so beginners and experienced users can both follow the result.

featureItems.title: Birth-chart context
featureItems.description: The result connects sign, degree, and house themes instead of treating the placement as a generic zodiac label.

featureItems.title: Astrocartography handoff
featureItems.description: After the placement, users can continue into the world map and ask how this theme may express through different locations.

featureItems.title: FAQ for search intent
featureItems.description: Common questions are answered clearly and marked up with FAQPage schema for better search understanding.

featureItems.title: Credible boundaries
featureItems.description: The copy avoids overpromising and keeps astrology reflective, practical, and trustworthy for real decisions.

faqDescriptionTemplate: Common questions about using this {title}, interpreting your result, and connecting the placement with astrocartography.
ctaDescription: Your placement becomes more useful when you connect it to real places. Generate your map, choose a city, and ask how love, growth, healing, work, or belonging may express there.
ctaButton: Explore your chart on the world map
